subject: Breast
title: Triple Assessment of a Breast Lump
hook: Every palpable breast lump needs clinical exam, imaging and biopsy.

points.heading: Ask two questions first
bullets: Is the lump painful or painless
Age is the most critical factor

points.heading: Age picks the scan
bullets: Young breasts are radiodense and hide lesions

points.heading: The occult cancer trap
bullets: A negative mammogram does not exclude cancer

captionLines: One palpable breast lump, three mandatory steps. 🔍
Triple assessment means clinical exam, imaging and biopsy together.
Age drives imaging. Ultrasound under 35. Add mammography over 35. A negative mammogram still needs biopsy if suspicious.
Recall Engine turns any lecture into SBAs, MCQs, flashcards and high-yield notes so the breast lump algorithm becomes second nature.
